body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: Granny + Nanny orchestration devices
body.description:
**What changed:** Added Granny Weatherwax (ticket gateway + coding orchestrator) and Nanny Ogg (scheduler + world-interaction dispatcher) as rack devices replacing scattered orchestration logic.
**Predicted unintended effects:** (1) cc_queue.py as pure storage may break existing callers that depend on its current routing/dispatch logic — audit all call sites before switching over. (2) Granny's Hebbian routing may develop strong edges to wrong workers early in training — routing decisions in first week need monitoring. (3) Nanny taking over Igor's internal scheduler may leave timing gaps if the switchover isn't atomic — Igor fires twice or not at all during transition. (4) Agent registry as a single point of failure — if Nanny is down, all world-interaction tickets queue indefinitely with no visibility.
**Signals to watch:** cc_queue.py call site errors post-switchover; routing edge weights in first 7 days; Igor alignment review cadence during Nanny transition; world ticket queue depth when Nanny is restarted.
**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-11.

**Affected files:** None — observation and verification only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe predicted effects; annotate outcome as occurred / clear / partial and close
**Test plan:** no tests — this is an observation ticket
